rooms.name: Town Square
rooms.description: A weathered cobblestone plaza at the heart of a small town. A handsome young Labrador with mischief in his eyes notices you and wags his tail. A fountain burbles in the center, and a wooden signpost points in all directions.

rooms.name: The Rusty Flagon Tavern
rooms.description: A dimly lit tavern that smells of ale and woodsmoke. Gruff adventurers murmur at scarred oak tables. A red-faced bartender polishes mugs behind the bar.

rooms.name: Tavern Loft
rooms.description: A dusty loft above the tavern. Straw mattresses are pushed against the walls. A cracked window overlooks the town square below.

rooms.name: Town Market
rooms.description: Colourful stalls line the road – vendors hawk everything from fresh bread to peculiar trinkets. The noise and bustle is almost overwhelming.

rooms.name: Alchemist's Shop
rooms.description: Shelves packed with bubbling vials and drying herbs crowd every surface. The air reeks of sulphur and something floral. An old alchemist peers at you over thick spectacles.

rooms.name: East Road
rooms.description: A rutted dirt track leading away from town toward a distant dark forest. The trees loom large on the horizon. The road continues east.

rooms.name: Forest Edge
rooms.description: The road dissolves into a tangle of roots and undergrowth at the edge of a dense forest. Strange sounds drift from the shadowed canopy. A narrow path leads north.

rooms.name: Deep Forest
rooms.description: Huge ancient trees block out the sky. Bioluminescent fungi cast an eerie blue glow across the undergrowth. You feel watched. The path home leads south.

rooms.name: Blacksmith's Forge
rooms.description: The heat from the forge is intense. Weapons and armour hang from every hook. A massive blacksmith hammers a glowing sword blade on a thick anvil.
